title: <div>Use the proper naming convention when saving your assignment. The naming co
content:
Use the proper naming convention when saving your assignment. The naming convention is ENG101_wk4_assn_firstintiallastname_date—for example, ENG101_wk4_assn_jsmith_mmddyyyy.
Submit the Week 4 Assignment by the end of the week. See the video below to review the process.


Click Next to take the Week 4 Quiz.
